# Bosch BME68x SensorAPI

Vendored from `boschsensortec/BME68x_SensorAPI` commit
`80ea120a8b8ac987d7d79eb68a9ed796736be845`.

Included files are `bme68x.c`, `bme68x.h`, and `bme68x_defs.h`. The upstream BSD-3-Clause license is
preserved in `LICENSE`. The node adapter uses the API's forced mode, calibration block, compensation,
new-data flag, gas-valid flag, and heater-stability flag.
